## Description

Brief summary of the changes. What problem does this PR solve, or what feature does it add?

## Related Issue(s)

Closes #(issue number), or references #(issue number) if it doesn't fully close.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Dependencies update

## Changes Made

- List key changes here
- Describe what was modified or added
- Note any new files or significant restructuring

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes:

- [ ] Manual testing (describe)
- [ ] Tested on macOS / Windows / Linux
- [ ] Verified linting: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Verified type checking: `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Hot-reload works as expected: `npm run dev`

### Test Scenarios

If applicable, describe specific scenarios you tested:

1. Scenario 1: ...
2. Scenario 2: ...

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's code standards (TypeScript strict, clear comments)
- [ ] No `any` types introduced across process boundaries
- [ ] ESLint passes: `npm run lint`
- [ ] TypeScript strict check passes: `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] No breaking changes, or migration plan provided
- [ ] Documentation updated (if feature or API change)
- [ ] Commits follow [conventional commit](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] No unrelated changes included

## Breaking Changes

If this is a breaking change, describe the impact and any migration path:

- Previous behavior: ...
- New behavior: ...
- Migration: ...

## Additional Context

- Screenshots / GIFs (if UI change)
- Performance metrics (if performance improvement)
- Links to related PRs or issues
- Any other notes for reviewers

## Reviewer Notes

- Particular areas to focus on
- Any known limitations or future work
- Questions or concerns for maintainers
